message:
refactor(session): wrap SessionEntry in Arc for shared ownership and add snapshot indexing

**session_sqlite.rs**: Change the session entry storage from
Vec<SessionEntry> to Vec<Arc<SessionEntry>> throughout load_session(),
load_session_meta(), save_session(), and compute_message_count_and_name().
This enables zero-copy sharing of session entries across concurrent
readers (e.g., the agent loop and background index updates) without
requiring full deep clones of potentially large message payloads.
All existing tests updated to wrap entries in Arc::new().

**session_index.rs**: Extract the core upsert logic into a private
upsert_meta() method and add a new public index_session_snapshot()
method that accepts pre-computed header + message_count + name instead
of requiring a full Session object. This allows callers with partial
session state (e.g., after append without full reload) to update the
index efficiently.

Generify session_stats() to accept &[T] where T: Borrow<SessionEntry>,
enabling it to work with both owned entries and Arc-wrapped entries
without conversion overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
